Name: Hostingway
Description: For venue managers to track guests and sync information with staff, manage death roll tournaments, create shout templates, and more. Contact author at Mikenno on Discord for any assistance.
Punchline: A utility tool for venue managers.
Author: The Warrior of WHAT
Changelog:
- Greetingway: Added VIP to Sync 
 - Settings: Included Export Button for VIP List. VIPs must be listed as First Last@World 
 Contact Mikenno @ Discord for any other features or bugs ♥
